mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (`timestamp`, `user`, affecteduser, app, subject, subjectparams, file, object_type, object_id) VALUES (#{timestamp}, #{user}, #{affecteduser}, 'files', #{subject}, #{subjectparams}, #{file}, #{objectType}, #{objectId})
mapper.select: SELECT activity_id AS activityId, `timestamp`, `user`, subject, subjectparams, object_id AS objectId FROM activity WHERE object_id = #{fileId} AND object_type = 'files' ORDER BY `timestamp` DESC, activity_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
